ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher overseeing the experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the experiment */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used in the experiment */,
  "procedure" TEXT /* Detailed procedure of the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* Any known health conditions */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Any known allergies */,
  "medications" TEXT /* Any medications the participant is taking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physiological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the data is related to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant from whom the data was collected */,
  "gsr_max" REAL /* Maximum GSR value recorded */,
  "gsr_min" REAL /* Minimum GSR value recorded */,
  "min_ra" REAL /* Minimum respiratory rate recorded */,
  "max_ra" REAL /* Maximum respiratory rate recorded */,
  "gsr_mean" REAL /* Mean GSR value */,
  "gsr_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of GSR values */,
  "gsr_var" REAL /* Variance of GSR values */,
  "ecg_avg" REAL /* Average ECG value */,
  "ecg_median" REAL /* Median ECG value */,
  "ecg_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of ECG values */,
  "heart_rate" REAL /* Heart rate measurements */,
  "respiratory_rate" REAL /* Respiratory rate measurements */,
  "blood_pressure_systolic" REAL /* Systolic blood pressure */,
  "blood_pressure_diastolic" REAL /* Diastolic blood pressure */,
  "skin_temperature" REAL /* Skin temperature measurements */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used for measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_physiological_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_physiological_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emotions" (
  "emotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emotion category */,
  "emotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the emotion (e.g., Fear, Happiness) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emotion */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Subcategory of the emotion (e.g., joy, sorrow) */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity level of the emotion (0-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emotion_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the physiological data record */,
  "emotion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the classified emotion */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotion_classifications_emotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("emotion_id") REFERENCES emotions ("emotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotion_classifications_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES physiological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the session belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant involved */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version log */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the physiological data record */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versioning_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES physiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versioning_changer_id FOREIGN KEY ("changer_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis_logs" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis log */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physiological data record being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., statistical, visual) */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the results obtained from the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the analysis */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES physiological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the physiological data record */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data (e.g., 0-10) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user conducting the quality assessment */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the quality assessment */,
  "retest_date" TEXT /* Date for retest if required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assessments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES physiological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sharing request */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher making the request */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being requested for sharing */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "external_party" TEXT /* Name of the external party requesting the data */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the data sharing request */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the request */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the request was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_requests_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES physiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_requests_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
